request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a contract's heat tier and its top recent matching records, write a one-sentence (≤220 char) explanation of what is driving heat at this level this week. Also list 1-3 short primary drivers (≤120 chars each). Return JSON matching the schema.
request.user:
Tier: critical
Heat: 176.48
Delta_7d: -129.55
Top records:
- 2024-04-29 FinCEN to Host Webinar on Beneficial Ownership Information Reporting Requirement

- 2023-11-21 In the Matter of Binance Holdings Limited, et. al. d/b/a Binance and Binance.com

primary_drivers: FinCEN BOI registry launch and reporting requirements
High-profile enforcement (Binance) and elevated consumer-compliance supervision
response.explainer: Critical heat is driven by FinCEN’s BOI registry rollout and outreach, high-profile enforcement (Binance), and elevated consumer-compliance supervisory activity, though overall interest fell this week.
